prompt: A clean premium fashion campaign banner shot against a warm beige textured plaster wall, featuring 3 Indian men standing side by side full torso to upper thigh, evenly spaced across the frame, all with their hands in their pockets and looking slightly away from the camera. The styling is minimalist, editorial, and aspirational, with soft natural studio lighting and muted earthy tones. On the left, a lean man with short curly dark hair wears a slate blue crew-neck t-shirt and off-white trousers; in the center, an athletic man with short black hair wears an ivory cream crew-neck t-shirt and dark charcoal trousers; on the right, a heavier relaxed-build man with medium-length wavy dark hair wears a faded charcoal crew-neck t-shirt and light beige trousers. The t-shirts should look well-fitted on different body types, with realistic cotton texture, subtle folds, and clean hems. Add large elegant serif text in the upper left reading finally. in off-white, with smaller sans-serif subheading below reading Made for every Indian body.. Place 3 small uppercase captions near the bottom beneath each model: left caption BROAD SHOULDERS. PERFECT FIT., center caption "ATHLETIC BUILD. PERFECT FIT.", right caption "RELAXED FRAME. PERFECT FIT.". Add tiny uppercase footer text at the bottom left reading "DESIGNED IN INDIA. FITTED FOR INDIA." and brand text at the bottom right reading JUGGERKNOT ORIGINALS. Include a thin horizontal divider line running near the bottom across most of the image. Wide aspect ratio, luxury apparel ad aesthetic, realistic photography, neutral color grading, uncluttered composition, high-end Indian menswear branding.
